req.title: Procedure record (boundary)
req.statement: A clinician shall record a Procedure tied to an Encounter. Boundary cases on timestamps and numeric elements must be tested.

doc.reasoning: R-HLT-036 mandates that a Procedure can be recorded against an open/referenced Encounter via POST /Procedure. Three primary risk areas drive test selection: (1) happy-path creation with a valid encounter reference (EP), (2) rejection when the encounter reference is absent (NEG/DT), and (3) boundary values on the performedDateTime and numeric fields such as sequence numbers at their minimum and maximum legal values (BVA). Each test is isolated through fixture-injected base URL and fresh encounter IDs, making them idempotent and deterministic.

tests.name: test_create_procedure_valid_encounter_returns_201
preconditions: A valid open Encounter exists with id provided by <encounter_id_fixture>
actions: POST /Procedure with resourceType=Procedure, status=completed, code.text=Appendectomy, performedDateTime=2024-06-15T10:00:00Z, encounter.reference pointing to existing Encounter
expected: encounter.reference in response matches submitted reference
trace: R-HLT-036 – positive outcome: procedure stored when encounter present
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

def test_create_procedure_valid_encounter_returns_201(base_url, encounter_id):
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Procedure",
        "status": "completed",
        "code": {"text": "Appendectomy"},
        "performedDateTime": "2024-06-15T10:00:00Z",
        "encounter": {"reference": f"Encounter/{encounter_id}"}
    }
    resp = requests.post(f"{base_url}/Procedure", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code == 201
    body = resp.json()
    assert "id" in body
    assert body["resourceType"] == "Procedure"
    assert body["encounter"]["reference"] == f"Encounter/{encounter_id}"

tests.name: test_create_procedure_missing_encounter_returns_422
preconditions: No encounter reference is provided in the payload
actions: POST /Procedure with resourceType=Procedure, status=completed, code.text=Appendectomy, performedDateTime=2024-06-15T10:00:00Z, encounter field omitted
expected: Response body contains error detail referencing missing encounter
trace: R-HLT-036 – error pathway: 422 when encounter missing
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

def test_create_procedure_missing_encounter_returns_422(base_url):
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Procedure",
        "status": "completed",
        "code": {"text": "Appendectomy"},
        "performedDateTime": "2024-06-15T10:00:00Z"
    }
    resp = requests.post(f"{base_url}/Procedure", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code == 422
    body = resp.json()
    assert "error" in body or "issue" in body

tests.name: test_create_procedure_boundary_timestamp_midnight_utc
preconditions: A valid open Encounter exists with id provided by <encounter_id_fixture>
performedDateTime is set to the minimum-precision boundary: midnight UTC 1970-01-01T00:00:00Z
actions: POST /Procedure with performedDateTime=1970-01-01T00:00:00Z (Unix epoch boundary) and valid encounter reference
trace: R-HLT-036 – boundary case: minimum allowable performedDateTime (epoch)
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

def test_create_procedure_boundary_timestamp_midnight_utc(base_url, encounter_id):
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Procedure",
        "status": "completed",
        "code": {"text": "Boundary Procedure"},
        "performedDateTime": "1970-01-01T00:00:00Z",
        "encounter": {"reference": f"Encounter/{encounter_id}"}
    }
    resp = requests.post(f"{base_url}/Procedure", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code == 201
    body = resp.json()
    assert body["performedDateTime"] == "1970-01-01T00:00:00Z"

tests.name: test_create_procedure_boundary_future_timestamp_max_precision
preconditions: A valid open Encounter exists with id provided by <encounter_id_fixture>
performedDateTime is set to a far-future ISO-8601 value to probe upper bound acceptance
actions: POST /Procedure with performedDateTime=9999-12-31T23:59:59Z (max FHIR dateTime) and valid encounter reference
expected: HTTP 201 Created or HTTP 422 if server rejects far-future dates
If 422: response body contains a validation issue for performedDateTime
trace: R-HLT-036 – boundary case: maximum performedDateTime value

tests.name: test_create_procedure_nonexistent_encounter_reference_returns_422
preconditions: Encounter ID used does not exist in the system
actions: POST /Procedure with encounter.reference pointing to a non-existent Encounter ID (e.g. Encounter/DOES-NOT-EXIST-00000)
expected: Response body contains an issue or error indicating the referenced Encounter was not found
trace: R-HLT-036 – error pathway: encounter reference resolves to nothing (decision: encounter present but invalid)
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

def test_create_procedure_nonexistent_encounter_reference_returns_422(base_url):
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Procedure",
        "status": "completed",
        "code": {"text": "Ghost Encounter Procedure"},
        "performedDateTime": "2024-06-15T10:00:00Z",
        "encounter": {"reference": "Encounter/DOES-NOT-EXIST-00000"}
    }
    resp = requests.post(f"{base_url}/Procedure", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code == 422
    body = resp.json()
    assert "error" in body or "issue" in body
